hero.name: Roman Ferrero
hero.tagline: I am a Computer Engineering student at Universidad ORT Uruguay, focused on building modern, scalable, and user-friendly web applications. I enjoy turning ideas into clean, functional digital products while continuously improving my skills as a software developer.

about.title: Building software with a focus on quality and continuous learning
about.lead: I am an advanced Computer Engineering student at Universidad ORT Uruguay, close to completing my degree, and I am also currently training in Full-Stack Development at Coderhouse. I focus on building modern web applications, REST APIs, and data-driven solutions while applying good practices in programming, documentation, and version control.
about.secondary: During my internship at BASF, I was part of the Tech Team, where I worked with SAP data and developed VBA macros to optimize internal processes. I also strengthened my knowledge of .NET, Node.js, Git, and SQL, while gaining experience collaborating within a team. I am now looking to start my professional career as a developer, contributing to the development, maintenance, and improvement of real-world systems.
